calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Ema Bell's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment, which is unopposed, is granted. Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Order signed. Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
